you that you have to use the A.V. chart of that planet which
happens to be the Karaka for the particular relative in order to
discover the prospects of that relative. One method is to use
the Rasi itself tenanted by the Karaka-plnnct as the Lagna.
For example, for father you take Hie Rasi occupied by the Sun.
Another method is to take the 9th house from the one occupied
by the Sun. In the case of the mother it is thc4 th house from
the one occupied by the Moon. 1 his line of reasoning is lo be
followed in other cases as well. Here I am giving some rules
for finding out the critical periods in the life of the subject's
father. What is the Sodhvapinda in the A.V. of the Sun
It is 24 in our example chart. Which is the 9th house froin the
one occupied by the Sun ? Mere it is Virgo. How many
benefic dots are there ? It has only 3 dots.
